headline: Citizens Highlights Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) on Strong Leasing Momentum and AI Strategy
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) ranks among the best real estate and realty stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. Citizens maintained a Market Outperform rating and a price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) on June 10, noting better lease traction and operational efforts. According to analyst Aaron Hecht, new rental rates […]
